creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
And make sure you did longer ago required updates to the config/database.yml:
production:
  main:
    adapter: postgresql
    encoding: unicode
    database: gitlabhq_production
    username: git
    password: "reducted"
    host: localhost
  ci:
    adapter: postgresql
    encoding: unicode
    database: gitlabhq_production
    database_tasks: false
    username: git
    password: "reducted"
    host: localhost

development:
...

staging:
...

test: &test
...
